invalid_zero_length_path_error: invalid primitive: sweep path has zero length
invalid_scale_error: invalid parameter sweep_scale_end: sweep end scale must be finite and > 0
parity_contracts: sweep path controls support deterministic polyline path sampling
path_segments=0 maps to vcad-aligned default of 32 path segments
twist and scale controls interpolate deterministically from start to end along path
zero-length paths and non-positive scales emit stable CAD diagnostics
repeated sweep evaluations replay deterministically for identical inputs
